selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 0.06 appears underpriced for a high temp <54°F in Denver on Feb 14. Historical February highs in Denver average ~47°F with typical range 40-55°F. A sub-54° outcome is reasonably common (~65-75% of years). Enrich bias of +0.0352 suggests market underestimation. Moderate confidence due to weather volatility and limited volume (1070).
